content.problemStatement:
Given a square matrix AAA, determine whether it is an upper triangular matrix or not.

**NOTE:** A matrix is upper triangular if all elements below the main diagonal are zero.


Input Format

The first line contains an integer NNN, representing the number of rows and columns of the square matrix.
The next NNN lines contain NNN space-separated integers, representing the elements of the matrix.


Output Format
Print "YES" if the matrix is an upper triangular matrix, and "NO" otherwise.
